final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 小红书 cover image for a tech announcement about GPT-image-2 launching on Lovart.

Style/medium: needs a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use diagonal composition
Subject: must include the launch announcement of GPT-image-2 on Lovart as the focal theme
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-contrast, punchy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a high-contrast with strong accent color direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must be formatted as a 小红书 cover (vertical)
Avoid:
